markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Announce a new GrowthX primary contact and align on the content strategy pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contact Change:** Erik O'Brien is now the primary GrowthX contact, replacing Carrie Chowske. Erik already manages the separate strategy sprint, streamlining communication.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Content Pivot:** Airbyte is pausing on-premise content to focus exclusively on cloud-related topics (e.g., Hewodet, S2R, CompetitorGap).](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Use Case Pages:** The project is proceeding. A template prototype is due next week, pending a full list of use cases from Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**TLDR Rollout:** New content now includes TLDRs. An automated engineering pipeline is being explored to efficiently add TLDRs to the entire back catalog.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Contact Handoff & Rationale

  - [Carrie Chowske is transitioning to new internal responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Erik O'Brien is the new primary contact for all Airbyte work (Sonar & Choral products).](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This change streamlines communication, as Erik already manages the separate strategy sprint. Jacob and Kyle will now be engaged only for specific projects.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Airbyte is pausing all on-premise content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**New Focus:** Exclusive production of cloud-related content.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Initial Topics:** Hewodet, S2R, and CompetitorGap.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This aligns with Airbyte's strategic business pivot toward AI.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Use Case Pages Project

  - [The project is proceeding as planned, interlinking with existing industry pages.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [**Industry Pages:** \~50% complete; the remaining 30 pages are being published this week, with full completion expected by EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Use Case Pages:** A template prototype is being built by the design team for Airbyte's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Blocker:** A full list of use cases is needed from Jacob to begin content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### TLDR Implementation

  - [**New Content:** All new editorial content now includes a "TLDR" summary at the top.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Back Catalog:** A plan is being developed to add TLDRs to the entire existing content library.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Method:** Joe is working with engineering on an automated pipeline to avoid manual refresh issues encountered previously.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:** Share the updated project tracker with Mario.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Get the full list of use cases from Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**GrowthX Design Team:** Deliver the use case page template prototype for review by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [**Erik:** Take over as the primary contact, managing both the strategy sprint and ongoing content work.](https://fathom.video/share/zVf6BFsoFBV3W2_2aH-HGP5gXr_AQYQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
